en: Oh, God. Oh, my God. Oh, my God.
It's so good to see you. Hey, you got my back.
Want me to carry it? Need to find a gap here.
How did you know we were here? The phone! That stupid jingle from the store! I heard it!
ko: 어떻게 우리가 여기 있는 걸 알았어?

en: My phone? Yeah, your satellite phone. Where is it? I don't have it.
When did you use it last?
On the plane. I got a call on the plane, and...
What? What? I loaned it to Nash.
He must have had it when he...
